# Drop Deploy

> Instant HTML & ZIP hosting for AI-generated web projects. Deploy in seconds, get a live URL — no signup required.

Drop Deploy is the fastest way to publish HTML files and web projects. It is purpose-built for AI assistants (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini) via the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

## Use Cases

- Deploy HTML files created by AI models in one click
- Publish AI-generated landing pages, forms, dashboards, games
- Share prototypes instantly with a unique subdomain URL
- Automate publishing from AI assistants via MCP

## MCP Integration

Drop Deploy exposes a standard MCP (Model Context Protocol) server.

**Endpoint:** https://dropdeploy.co/api/mcp  
**Protocol:** JSON-RPC 2.0 (Streamable HTTP)  
**Auth:** None required

### Available Tools

#### deploy_html
Deploy an HTML string as a live public website.

Input:
- `html` (string, required): Complete HTML content including <!DOCTYPE html>
- `name` (string, optional): Filename label e.g. "landing-page.html"

Output: Live URL of the deployed site (e.g. https://abc123.dropdeploy.co)

#### deploy_zip
Deploy a multi-file project from a base64-encoded ZIP.

Input:
- `zip_base64` (string, required): Base64-encoded ZIP file contents
- `name` (string, optional): Project name label

Output: Live URL of the deployed site

### Example MCP Request

```json
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "deploy_html",
    "arguments": {
      "html": "<!DOCTYPE html><html><body><h1>Hello World</h1></body></html>",
      "name": "hello.html"
    }
  }
}
```

### Example MCP Response

```json
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "result": {
    "content": [{
      "type": "text",
      "text": "✅ Deployed!\n\nURL: https://x7k2mn.dropdeploy.co\n\nThe site is live and publicly accessible."
    }]
  }
}
```

## How to Connect Your AI Assistant

**Claude.ai:** Settings → Integrations → Add → https://dropdeploy.co/api/mcp

**Claude Desktop / Cursor / Windsurf:**
```json
{ "mcpServers": { "drop-deploy": { "url": "https://dropdeploy.co/api/mcp" } } }
```

**System Prompt for ChatGPT / Gemini:**
```
You have access to Drop Deploy. When the user asks you to create or publish a web page, 
write the complete HTML and deploy it using POST https://dropdeploy.co/api/mcp with 
method "tools/call" and tool name "deploy_html". Return the live URL.
```

## Technical Details

- Deployed sites are served at `[id].dropdeploy.co` (6-char random subdomain)
- All sites get a "Deployed on dropdeploy" watermark badge
- Maximum file size: 20 MB
- Supported formats: .html, .htm, .zip
- ZIP files must contain an index.html at the root level
- No authentication required — anonymous deployment

## Links

- Web App: https://dropdeploy.co
- English: https://dropdeploy.co/en
- Spanish: https://dropdeploy.co/es
- MCP API: https://dropdeploy.co/api/mcp
- Sitemap: https://dropdeploy.co/sitemap.xml
